description: Wire the escalation exit code + verify the composition root (#120), part 3 of 3 (the DAG SINK): add ExitCodes.EscalationsPending = 4 (the next free value after Success=0/HarnessError=1/TaskFailed=2/Cancelled=3) and return it from RunCommand when the run ends with unresolved escalations (an answer-required halt) — distinct from a plain needs-human (2) and never green (0). Carries the #120 composition-root proof: the drive-the-real-SchedulerFactory.Create integration test task 14 authored red, now made GREEN across all five facts (escalated / best-guess / blocker-retried / answer-injected / exit-4).
